problem id: 64890e18
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10010100 -> 01011001
  11100100 -> 10011110
  11110101 -> 11011011
  11001010 -> 00100100
  00011000 -> 01100001
  10011100 -> 01111001
  01011010 -> 01101101
  11111111 -> 11110011

query: 00000011
predicted answer: 00001100
